case_title: KHURIN, SIMON VS BOYD JOHNSON OWNER OF CUSTOM HARDWOOD FLOORING et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY KHURIN, SIMON AS TO DEFENDANT BOYD JOHNSON OWNER OF CUSTOM HARDWOOD FLOORING B&B STAIR BUILDERS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-12-2007 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT BOYD JOHNSON OWNER OF CUSTOM HARDWOOD FLOORING
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION JUN-29-2007, CONTINUED BY COURT TO JUL-17-2007 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506 ORDER GRANTED.
PLAINTIFF FILED DECLARATION INSTRUCTING SMALL CLAIMS DIVISION TO HOLD PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS FOR ONE YEAR. COPY PLACED ON EXHIBIT ENVELOPE.
REQUEST TO CORRECT OR CANCEL JUDGMENT IS FILED BY PLTF. NOTICE OF ANSWER MAILED TO THE OTHER PARTY.
EXHIBITS RETURNED TO PLAINTIFF KHURIN, SIMON ADDITIONAL DEFENDANT EXHIBITS
DEFT'S CONTC ORDER REQUEST FILED; PAID $10 FEE; TO FOLDER/TRAY.
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION JUN-12-2007, CONTINUED BY COURT TO JUN-29-2007 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506 ORDER GRANTED.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KHURIN, SIMON RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BOYD JOHNSON OWNER OF CUSTOM HARDWOOD FLOORING B&B STAIR BUILDERS $750.00 PRINCIPAL, $240.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $990.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
COPY OF (SC-108A) ORDER ON REQUEST TO CORRECT OR CANCEL JUDGMENT SENT TO PARTIES.

PLTFF'S CONTC ORDER REQUEST FILED; PLTFF PAID$10 FEE;(NOTE:WHEN ASKED IF FORM IS COMPLETE, FRIEND INSISTED COMPLETE,PLTFF SILENT);TO FOLDER/TRAY.
